t_ch: …都是些无聊的故事而已，随便听听得了。
t_en: ...They're all just pointless stories. You can listen with a pinch of salt.

t_ch: 会觉得后悔吗？
t_en: Do you regret it?

t_ch: 所以…为了更好的生活，放弃原本的梦想，你会后悔吗？
t_en: So... do you regret it? Giving up on your original dream for a better life?

t_ch: 过去软弱的我已经不在了，现在我能独立生活，不用再靠梦想来欺骗自己。
t_en: The weak me of the past is long gone — I can now live independently without relying on dreams to lie to myself.

t_ch: 但…我把以前创作的曲子都做进了游戏里，就当是留个纪念吧。
t_en: But... I put all the songs I wrote into this game — a way to keep them as a memento.

t_ch: 哎呀，家人家人！好久不见，我可想死你了。老桑博有个不赚钱的好生意，想不想入个股？
t_en: Ahh, fam! It's been such a long time, and I missed you dearly. Old Sampo here has a great idea that won't make money. You interested in getting in on it?

t_ch: 多说了个不字吧你…
t_en: "Won't" make money...?

t_ch: 哈哈哈哈哈，别在意细节。咱们也是老相识了，你就当再帮我一个忙呗。
t_en: Hahaha, don't fret on the details. We're all old friends here. How about lending a hand, eh?

t_ch: 不赚钱你还找我？
t_en: Why are you asking for my help to not make money?

t_ch: 家人，这你就不懂了。有时不赚钱的事才好玩呢！
t_en: Oh buddy, you're not in the know then. Sometimes the most fun opportunities are those that won't make money!

t_ch: 有意思，算我一个。
t_en: Interesting. Count me in.

t_ch: 嘿，我就知道你是懂行的！
t_en: Ha, I knew you were a smart one!

t_ch: 长话短说，我老桑博耐不住寂寞，这不前阵子去了趟匹诺康尼，想起来件事……
t_en: Long story short, I was feeling really lonely, so I made a trip to Penacony not long ago. And then I remembered something...

t_ch: 看，一箱八年陈酿的「迷因」，就藏在贝洛伯格的雪地里呢！诶不对…当时是八年，现在该是几年来着？
t_en: Look, a meme crate that's been aged for eight years. Hidden right here in the Belobogian snow fields! No, wait... I found it eight years ago, so how many years would it be now?

t_ch: 这玩意儿哪来的？
t_en: Where did this even come from?

t_ch: 怎么说的像酒一样？
t_en: Why are you talking about it like it's liquor?

t_ch: 这东西的来源您就别问了，生意人都有点秘密。雅利洛-VI重回银轨后，老桑博认识了几个天外的朋友，才知道这玩意大有市场。
t_en: Thou shalt not inquire of the merchant the mysteries of their craft. After Jarilo-VI returned to the silver rail, I got to know several friends beyond the sky — that was when I was clued in on how big the market for this stuff was.

t_ch: 所以，他们提供门路，我来研发销售一条龙，然后试卖的利润全归你——我是不赚钱，但对您来说可是天大的好生意哪！
t_en: So they'll provide the product, I'll set up the entire sales strategy, and then you get all the profits for fronting this stuff during the trial stage — I won't make a dime, but it's a golden money-making opportunity for you!

t_ch: 要不这样，你手头有那么点儿<color=#dbc291ff>风之旋</color>和<color=#dbc291ff>气态流体</color>吗？先拿材料入个股，咱们合点东西出来，看看这生意是怎么做的就明白了。
t_en: How about this — do you have even a little <color=#dbc291ff>Vortex of Wind</color> and <color=#dbc291ff>Gaseous Liquid</color> to spare? You can use these materials to stake your share, and we'll synthesize some stuff out of it. See how we can go about this biz, and you'll get the hang of it then.

t_ch: 放心，家人：脏活累活，都是外包机器人的活。
t_en: Don't worry, buddy: The tiring, dirty work will be outsourced to robots.

t_ch: 什么，材料不够？没事，等你准备好了，随时回来啊。
t_en: What, not enough materials? Don't worry. I'll wait for you to get some. Come back anytime.

t_ch: 哦，材料凑齐了？那咱们这就合点东西出来，看看这生意是怎么做的。
t_en: Ooh, got all the materials ready? Let's get to synthesizing then. See how this business works.

t_ch: 没骗人吧，这生意够简单？
t_en: See? I'm not lying to you. This business is really this easy.

t_ch: 简单是简单…
t_en: I mean, it is, but...

t_ch: 你这真不是黑店？
t_en: You sure this isn't a front for something shady?

t_ch: 瞧你说的，打差评的我都给退货，怎么就成黑店了？买东西嘛，总有货不对板的时候。但在咱们这儿，商品不重要，重要的是交易的快乐。
t_en: Balderdash. I refund all who leave bad reviews. How am I doing something illegal? It's buying and selling, after all, and we can't always meet every customer's needs. But as for what we're doing here, our products aren't that important. It's the very fun of trading.

t_ch: 这可不是我编的，不知你听没听过一个故事：世界尽头有座酒馆，里面啥人都有，甭管什么来头，只要能提供乐子，就能坐下来喝杯酒。
t_en: I'm not making this up. I don't know if you've heard of this tale: There is a tavern at the end of the world that contains people from all walks of life. No matter who they are, all are welcome for a drink as long as they can provide entertainment.

t_ch: 咱们这买卖，和那酒馆里的饮料也没啥区别，主打一个情绪价值！来，给你看看完整的商品清单，包满意。
t_en: This trading biz of ours isn't any different from the drinks available in that bar — we're all selling a sentimental value! Come, take a look at the complete goods list. Satisfaction guaranteed.

t_ch: 查看预售清单。
t_en: View the pre-sale list.

t_ch: 这生意一定成，家人记得常回来看看啊！
t_en: This business will succeed for sure! Come back often, fam!

t_ch: 想随便聊两句？我最近琢磨了个笑话，你看看如何——「世上充斥着自以为是的智慧，只有傻子才明白它们都是笑话！」
t_en: Just wanna chat? I thought of a joke recently. Give me your feedback: "The world brims with narcissistic wisdom. Only a fool knows that they're all a joke!"

t_ch: 不知道笑点在哪？这就对了，因为它只是一个<color=#dbc291ff>笑话</color>，哈哈。
t_en: You don't know what's so funny about that? That's the point — because it's just <color=#dbc291ff>a joke</color>, haha.

t_ch: 哎，您来的正好，小店刚开张呢。今天，在迷因的催化下，<color=#dbc291ff>虚粒子</color>和<color=#dbc291ff>燃素</color>将汇聚成一团引人深思的火。要试试吗？
t_en: Ooh, you came at just the right time. Our stall just opened. Today, with meme catalysis, <color=#dbc291ff>Virtual Particles</color> and <color=#dbc291ff>Phlogiston</color> will coalesce into a fire that provokes profundity. Care for a try?

t_ch: 来吧。
t_en: Bring it on.

t_ch: 什么，材料不够？没事，等你准备好了，随时回来啊。
t_en: What, not enough materials? Don't worry. I'll wait for you to get some. Come back anytime.

t_ch: 红红火火，吉利啊。
t_en: Red and fiery, a lucky portent.

t_ch: 聊聊这单生意。
t_en: Let's talk about this deal.

t_ch: 怎么，还想听那酒馆的故事？我还以为各位「开拓」朋友早拜访过了呢。可惜，老桑博也不是什么万事通，也有不方便多讲的事。
t_en: Mm, care to hear the story of the tavern still? I thought the friends of Trailblaze would've already visited it. Alas, Old Sampo's not all-knowing, and there are many stories that aren't convenient for me to share.

t_ch: 不过听说那酒馆会自己找上有故事的人，我看您也是个搞「欢愉」的人才，说不定哪天就收到邀请了？哈哈。
t_en: But I hear that the tavern will actively seek those out with stories. You look like a talent with a penchant for "elation." Perhaps you might receive an invitation one of these days? Haha.

t_ch: 我要走了。
t_en: I have to go.

t_ch: 家人慢走，明天还来啊！
t_en: Take care, friend. Come back tomorrow!

t_ch: 咱们做生意，讲究的就是把东边的买卖到西边去。您别说，这迷因在贝洛伯格没啥用处，但换个地还真有人喜欢得不得了。
t_en: Business people like us are all about buying things from one place and selling them to other places. You might think that this meme isn't working out in Belobog, but someone might actually love it on some other planet.

t_ch: 您来啦。今天要准备的材料是<color=#dbc291ff>雷之眼</color>和<color=#dbc291ff>金属</color>，听着就刺激。开始吗？
t_en: You're here. The materials that need to be prepped today are the <color=#dbc291ff>Eyes of Lightning</color> and <color=#dbc291ff>Metal</color> — sounds intense. Shall we begin?

t_ch: 来吧。
t_en: Bring it on.

t_ch: 什么，材料不够？没事，等你准备好了，随时回来啊。
t_en: What, not enough materials? Don't worry. I'll wait for you to get some. Come back anytime.

t_ch: 哎哟，好评如潮啊！
t_en: Oh-ho, the positive reviews are flooding in!

t_ch: 聊聊这单生意。
t_en: Let's talk about this deal.

t_ch: 你好奇这商品背后的故事？那老桑博可要唠唠了。还记得我的天外朋友么？那其中有位纯美骑士——
t_en: You're curious about the story behind this product? Let me regale you, then. Remember my friends from beyond the sky? Among them was a Knight of Beauty...

t_ch: 他给我讲了个征服雷电的故事。说是一位科学家，想验证闪电与静电同出一源，挑了个雷电交加的日子去放风筝。
t_en: He told me a story about conquering the lightning. Said it was a scientist who wanted to verify that the sources of lightning and static electricity are the same, and chose a stormy day to fly a kite.

t_ch: 那风筝上连着根金属丝，随着「啪」一声巨响，天上的雷光就被他收在了一只当容器的玻璃瓶里。
t_en: That kite was tied to a metal thread, and with a massive "bang," he successfully stored a flash of lightning from the sky in a glass bottle.

t_ch: 同时，那人自己也被落雷劈了个半死，有趣的事情来了，那位高洁的骑士大喊道——「这一刻，您拥抱了神圣的纯美！」
t_en: But, he was also struck half-dead by the lightning itself. Here's where it gets interesting! That elegant knight yelled out — "In this very moment, you have embraced the divine Beauty!"

t_ch: 这都什么人哪——他要再感慨，那人真得下去拥抱伊德莉拉了！
t_en: Who the heck was that? If he were any more emotional, he'd probably go down personally and embrace Idrila!

t_ch: 我要走了。
t_en: I have to go.

t_ch: 家人慢走，明天还来啊！
t_en: Take care, friend. Come back tomorrow!

t_ch: 调侃归调侃，老桑博我最欣赏纯美骑士了。世上只有两种人像他们一样坚定，一种是傻子，一种——是愚者。
t_en: I jest, but the Knights of Beauty are most deserving of my utmost admiration. There are only two types of people as steadfast as them: Idiots and fools.

t_ch: 来得正好——希望你还没听腻。咱们今天要鼓捣点玩具，材料是…<color=#dbc291ff>冰之芯</color>和<color=#dbc291ff>固态净水</color>。开始吗？
t_en: You came at the right time. I was hoping you'd be back for more stories. We're cooking up some toys today, and the materials are... <color=#dbc291ff>Cores of Ice</color> and <color=#dbc291ff>Solid Water</color>. Shall we begin?

t_ch: 来吧。
t_en: Bring it on.

t_ch: 什么，材料不够？没事，等你准备好了，随时回来啊。
t_en: What, not enough materials? Don't worry. I'll wait for you to get some. Come back anytime.

t_ch: 瞧我说什么，大受欢迎啊。
t_en: What'd I say? They're a surefire hit.

t_ch: 聊聊这单生意。
t_en: Let's talk about this deal.

t_ch: 实不相瞒，这东西的灵感来自一种玩具小鸟。长了张惊恐的脸，捏一下就会发出刺耳的叫声，我特别喜欢。
t_en: Truth be told, the inspiration for this came from a toy bird. With its expression stuck in horror, emitting a shrill screech whenever you squeeze on it... I really loved it.

t_ch: 拿着它，你就能顺理成章地在任意场合破冰——而一块冰也只有不断发笑，才能避免在这个浮躁的时代融化成一滩污水，哈哈。
t_en: With this thing, you can break the ice in any situation with ease, and an ice cube can only keep laughing to prevent itself from melting into a puddle of waste water in such a capricious age, haha.

t_ch: 我要走了。
t_en: I have to go.

t_ch: 家人慢走，明天还来啊！
t_en: Take care, friend. Come back tomorrow!

t_ch: 你别说，最近解压玩具越来越流行了。谁让世界上净是些让人笑不出来的事呢？
t_en: Honestly though, these stress relief toys are really getting popular these days. Then again, the world's full of turmoil that makes it hard to laugh.

t_ch: 别来无恙，亲爱的无名客——虽然我们每天都在见面。今天的商品有点特别，你绝对想不到<color=#dbc291ff>火之翎</color>和<color=#dbc291ff>基本食材</color>能变成什么。开始吗？
t_en: Salutations, my dear Nameless — though we meet every day. Today's product is a bit special. You'll never guess what <color=#dbc291ff>Feathers of Flame</color> and <color=#dbc291ff>Basic Ingredients</color> can be combined into. Shall we begin?

t_ch: 来吧。
t_en: Bring it on.

t_ch: 什么，材料不够？没事，等你准备好了，随时回来啊。
t_en: What, not enough materials? Don't worry. I'll wait for you to get some. Come back anytime.

t_ch: 没想到吧，咱们店里还卖文具呢。
t_en: Bet you weren't expecting that our stall sells stationery too.

t_ch: 聊聊这单生意。
t_en: Let's talk about this deal.

t_ch: 人要是太在意结果，就容易走火入魔。某种意义上说，这东西还挺危险的。我来教你一些不受它影响的小技巧吧。
t_en: If people get too obsessed with the outcome, they'll be driven mad. In other words, this thing's pretty dangerous. Let me teach you some tricks to avoid its influence.

t_ch: 人要想看得开，就得先学会自嘲。如果什么时候，你身陷精神的折磨无法自拔——
t_en: To become more open-minded, one must first learn to be self-deprecating. If there ever comes a time when you're trapped in mental torment without hope of escape...

t_ch: 就鼓起勇气抱怨自己的晚餐吧，它总能令人失望！
t_en: Just muster the courage to complain about your dinner, for it's always such a let-down!

t_ch: 我要走了。
t_en: I have to go.

t_ch: 家人慢走，明天还来啊！
t_en: Take care, friend. Come back tomorrow!

t_ch: 你问我自嘲有什么窍门？我不是喜剧演员，哪知道这个。但我见过一些人，他们不在乎段子是否好笑，只想倾尽全力让别人听见自己的笑声……
t_en: What are some tips there for self-deprecation, you ask? I'm not a comedic actor, I wouldn't know. But I have seen some who disregard the comedy of their routines and only doing their utmost to let others hear their own laughter...

t_ch: 我的天，太可怕了，千万别变成这样的人啊。
t_en: Heavens, that's so scary. Please don't become someone like that.

t_ch: 嘿，又等来您嘞。老桑博今天打算整点高级货，只需一点<color=#dbc291ff>陨铁</color>和<color=#dbc291ff>金属</color>，开始吗？
t_en: Heh, I've been waiting for you. I'm getting ready to hustle some premium goods this time. I just need some <color=#dbc291ff>Meteoric Alloy</color> and <color=#dbc291ff>Metal</color>. Shall we begin?

t_ch: 来吧。
t_en: Bring it on.

t_ch: 什么，材料不够？没事，等你准备好了，随时回来啊。
t_en: What, not enough materials? Don't worry. I'll wait for you to get some. Come back anytime.

t_ch: 哟…人们是过得多苦，这东西比想象中还受欢迎啊。
t_en: Mm... How much hardship must people be suffering from... This item is more popular than I imagined.

t_ch: 聊聊这单生意。
t_en: Let's talk about this deal.

t_ch: 这复读机又让我想起了那酒馆的传说。据说世界尽头的酒馆对谁都敞开大门，唯独不欢迎一种人——
t_en: This Echoer reminds me of that tavern's legend again. It's said that the World's End Tavern opens its doors to all, except for a certain type...

t_ch: 那种人每天都在做同样的事，循规蹈矩一成不变…无聊透顶，活得比智械更像机器人。
t_en: The type who does the same thing over and over every day, never-changing in their routine... Humdrum, mundane, even more of a robot than an Intellitron.

t_ch: ——话虽如此，这传说应该不怎么靠谱。谁的生活能没有一点鸡飞狗跳？如果真有，老桑博倒想见识一番，哈哈。
t_en: ...That may be so, but this fable is just that, after all. Who wouldn't have an ounce of hectic excitement in their lives? I'd like to meet such a person, haha.

t_ch: 我要走了。
t_en: I have to go.

t_ch: 家人慢走，明天还来啊！
t_en: Take care, friend. Come back tomorrow!

t_ch: 说到鸡飞狗跳，你看过愚人戏吗？和一般的喜剧不一样，剧本没有节奏、没有主次，演员们涂脂抹粉，互相踩脚、扭作一团，每个人都觉得自己是世界的中心……
t_en: Speaking of chaos, have you ever seen a farce? It's different from a regular comedy — there's no rhythm to the script, no main or secondary roles. The actors are heavily made up, stepping on each other's toes, twisting around together, with each one thinking they're the center of the world...

t_ch: ——哎，怎么越说越像现实生活呢，不成不成。
t_en: ...Oof, that sounds eerily similar to real life, and that won't do.

t_ch: 家人，今天就是寒腿小店的最后一日。用<color=#dbc291ff>量子涟漪</color>再加上一点<color=#dbc291ff>种子</color>，这次我们将揭开寰宇的奥秘——开玩笑的。开始吗？
t_en: Fam, it's the last day for this shop's old games. Use <color=#dbc291ff>Quantum Ripples</color>, and add a few <color=#dbc291ff>Seeds</color>, and we'll be unlocking the secrets of the universe... Just kidding. Shall we begin?

t_ch: 来吧。
t_en: Bring it on.

t_ch: 什么，材料不够？没事，等你准备好了，随时回来啊。
t_en: What, not enough materials? Don't worry. I'll wait for you to get some. Come back anytime.

t_ch: 搞定，可算是把这箱「迷因」都{RUBY_B#卖完}变现{RUBY_E#}了。怎么样，又有趣又来钱，不亏吧？
t_en: All done. Finally managed to {RUBY_B#sell out}monetize{RUBY_E#} this meme crate. How about it? Fun and money-making, pretty worth it, eh?

t_ch: 够朋友。
t_en: You're a good friend.

t_ch: 哈哈哈哈哈！我就知道你乐在其中。
t_en: Hahaha! I knew you'd be pleased.

t_ch: 还是举报你卖假货吧…
t_en: I'm still going to report you for selling fake goods...

t_ch: 怎么还这么说，差评我可是都给退货了啊。
t_en: Why would you do that? I refunded all the customers who left poor reviews.

t_ch: 不过，我想你多少也会好奇，我怎么偏偏在这时做起了「迷因」生意？
t_en: Though, I gather you must be at least a little curious — why would I choose to get into the meme business at this time?

t_ch: 也没必要瞒着，老桑博最近见了几位朋友，想再聚一次喝上几杯。还记得我们聊到的那座酒馆吗？其实哪里都一样啊，吧台上不缺酒水，只缺故事。
t_en: I have nothing to hide anyway. I met a few friends recently for a few drinks. Remember that tavern we talked about? It's all the same everywhere — there's never a lack of booze at bar tops, only stories.

t_ch: 所以，这趟买卖，你赚钱，我赚乐子。把能自发生产故事的「迷因」卖到宇宙各地去——今晚我就不愁没笑话可讲咯。
t_en: Which is why, you made money this trip, and I got to have my fun. To be able to sell memes that self-create stories across the galaxy — I won't be lacking in funny tales tonight.

t_ch: 真是个功利的答案。
t_en: What a pragmatic answer.

t_ch: 哈哈，都认识多久了。这就是多年行商为咱积攒下的智慧。
t_en: Haha, we've known each other a long time. This is the accumulated wisdom of many years of being a traveling merchant.

t_ch: 很像你会做的事。
t_en: Sounds very much like something you'd do.

t_ch: 哈哈，谢谢夸奖。这就是多年行商为咱积攒下的智慧。
t_en: Haha, thank you for the compliment. This is the accumulated wisdom of many years of being a traveling merchant.

t_ch: 这么说来，这箱八年陈酿的「迷因」也是当初一位朋友送我的。回想起来，老桑博也有过一段堪比无名客的奇遇啊。
t_en: Which means to say, that crate of aged-eight-year meme was also gifted by a friend of mine. Thinking back, I've also had run-ins as adventurous as the Nameless have had.

t_ch: 哈哈，好汉不提当年勇，说我自己的冒险也没什么意思。回见，{NICKNAME}！虽然很多东西你不能喝……
t_en: Haha, a true man doesn't wax lyrical on his hot-blooded past. It's pointless to talk about my past adventures. I'll see you again, {NICKNAME}! Although there are many things you can't drink...

t_ch: 但老桑博可是打算去喝一杯咯！
t_en: But I intend to go have a drink!

t_ch: 哼着一首奇怪的小曲，桑博的背影渐渐离你远去。
t_en: Humming a strange tune, Sampo's silhouette slowly fades away in the distance.

t_ch: 磨得起劲的{RUBY_B#桑博}三宝磨{RUBY_E#}，一来一回摇得欢：黎明时分打个样，磨出一份自己吃；再磨一份拿去卖，还磨一份存起来！嘿！♪
t_en: Well the {RUBY_B#Sampo}magic mill{RUBY_E#} grinds when finished, to and fro the lid in rocking, grinds one measure at the day-break, grinds a measure fit for eating, grinds a second for the market, grinds a third one for the store-house! Ho! ♪

t_ch: 还有什么能帮助您的，家人？
t_en: Is there anything I can do to help, fam?

t_ch: 查看销售情况。
t_en: Check sales.

t_ch: 没什么。
t_en: Nothing else.

t_ch: 就是你有事找我？
t_en: You were looking for me?

t_ch: 对对对，是我，总算把你盼来了。听说星穹列车去过匹诺康尼了？正好有些事想跟你打听打听。
t_en: Yes yes, I was. My wait is finally over. I heard that the Astral Express traveled to Penacony before? I've been meaning to ask you about some matters.

t_ch: …你听说过一个叫波提欧的星际牛仔吗？
t_en: ...You heard of an interstellar cowboy named Boothill?

t_ch: 当然，我的老朋友了。
t_en: Of course, that's an old friend of mine.

t_ch: 哇哦，{F#姐们}{M#哥们}你也太酷了！不过这事你在空间站讲讲就算了，出去外面可别到处跟人说，免得给你惹出麻烦来。
t_en: Wow, you're so cool, {F#miss}{M#mister}! But you should probably forget about this exchange outside the space station — you don't want to run into any future trouble.

t_ch: 听过，不熟。
t_en: Heard of him, don't really know him.

t_ch: 好吧…我听说他的「悬赏金额」还在不断上涨，你要是见过他，倒是可以捞不少油水。哎，可惜了……
t_en: Okay... I hear his bounty is still going up. If you've seen him, you can probably get quite a hefty reward. Ah, what a pity...

t_ch: 之前很多人在追查他…
t_en: Many have been asking about him...

t_ch: 你还记得这么清楚，嘿嘿…我就说嘛，「公司」的专项委托，捞偏门的大好时机，多宝贵的机会啊……
t_en: Your memory's quite something, eh, heh-heh... I knew it, a special assignment from the IPC, definitely a grand opportunity off the beaten path, oh so precious...

t_ch: 好啦，不卖关子了。之前有各路人马在追查他的下落——就在前阵子吧，听说这家伙去了趟匹诺康尼，他们本来想去逮他。
t_en: All right. I'll stop trying to bait you. Everyone's been trying to find his whereabouts. Just a little while ago, I heard some guys went to Penacony to try their luck in catching him.

t_ch: 哎，这波提欧也挺闹腾的，竟然召集了不少帮手…本来就够乱的了，这下还来一大帮子添乱的。
t_en: Bah, this Boothill certainly does know how to stir up a sandstorm — he hired a whole horde of lackeys... It was sheer, unmitigated chaos.

t_ch: 得亏我温世齐大哥聪明，他总说：「情况越混乱，咱们就越是有机会捞点油水」。听说你最近也去匹诺康尼了，我就跟他承包了个「专项委托」回来。
t_en: Good thing my big bro Wen Shiqi is smart. Like he always says: "The more chaotic a situation is, the greater the chance of us profiting." I heard you recently went to Penacony too, so I contracted a special assignment with him.

t_ch: 这项委托旨在收集波提欧在匹诺康尼的近况情报，筛选出和他无关的信息，所以需要一位胆大又机灵，还能进出匹诺康尼的人士来干——我想啊，这人选就非你莫属了。
t_en: This assignment is to collect all recent intel related to Boothill on Penacony, and then filter out all unrelated information. Which is why we need a bold and astute person who can freely enter and exit Penacony to do this — I thought you'd be perfect for this job.

t_ch: 你们抽成多少？
t_en: What's your commission?

t_ch: 抽成为零，主要是想多些人脉多条路，就没想从你身上赚钱——而且艾丝妲站长警告过科员，不许我们克扣你的待遇。
t_en: Zero. I mainly wish to broaden my network, not try to make any money off you. Lead Researcher Asta also warned us that we aren't allowed to take advantage of you.

t_ch: 出卖巡海游侠，有违正义…
t_en: Betraying a Galaxy Ranger violates the code of justice...

t_ch: 别担心，波提欧身价那么高，谁欺负谁还不一定呢。那帮人肯定拿他没辙，咱们赚的就是这些菜鸟的钱。
t_en: Don't worry. With such a grand bounty on Boothill, I doubt he's in any actual peril. That lot most likely can't subdue him, and we're just making nickels on the dime here.

t_ch: 好啦，具体内容刚刚我已经在终端上同步给你了，你可以回去慢慢研究，在空间站里还是不要声张为好。
t_en: Okay, I've just sent you the details on the terminal. You can pore over the file on your own — it's not wise to be so ostentatious in the space station.

t_ch: 嘘，「专项委托」的事你可别对外声张，闷声发大财就好，免得被人看到又说我们科不务正业。
t_en: Shh, you shouldn't breathe a word about this special assignment. Just keep it to ourselves and make bank, otherwise people are going to say that our department's goofing off again.

t_ch: 嘘！小声，别让帕姆发现了…我们正给它挑慰劳礼物呢。
t_en: Shh, quiet! Pom-Pom can't know that... we're picking a present of appreciation for them.

t_ch: 怎么突然送礼物？
t_en: What's with the sudden gift?

t_ch: 长久以来，帕姆都任劳任怨地帮我们解决各种生活上的问题，可我们却一直没能好好感谢它。
t_en: For the longest time, Pom-Pom's helped us solve all sorts of daily life problems without the slightest grumble, but we've never properly thanked them before.

t_ch: 「慰劳」也太见外了吧？
t_en: You don't think a token of "appreciation" is too formal?

t_ch: 人们往往会因为「不是外人」而忽视了亲近者的情感需求。伙伴、家人、挚友，都是如此，越是亲近，越不该吝啬于感谢。
t_en: It's mostly because of this supposed informality that we ignore the feelings of close ones. Companions, family, bosom friends, it's all the same: The closer we are, the more generous we should be in our gratitude.

t_ch: 是啊…有时候还会发现，明明一起相处了那么久，却并不够了解对方。我们讨论了好一阵，才发现没人知道列车长会喜欢什么礼物。
t_en: That's right... Sometimes you'll even discover that you know so little about others, even though you spend so much time together. We were locked in discourse for a long while before realizing that none of us knew what gift the Conductor likes.

t_ch: 哼哼，所以我们决定各抒己见，讨论一下送什么礼物最合适～
t_en: Heh-heh, which is why we've decided to voice our opinions and discuss what kind of present is the best!

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，你有什么想法吗？
t_en: {NICKNAME}, what do you think about all this?

t_ch: 大喇叭。
t_en: A huge megaphone.

t_ch: 帕姆需要传达通知和警报，更大功率的喇叭可以节省些力气。不错吧？
t_en: Pom-Pom needs to deliver notices and announcements, and a more effective megaphone will save them some strength. Not bad, eh?

t_ch: 帕姆现在就想要！！！
t_en: Pom-Pom wants it right now!!!

t_ch: 电磁炮台。
t_en: An electromagnetic turret.

t_ch: 这样就算我们不在，帕姆也能保护列车的安全了！
t_en: In times when we're not around, Pom-Pom can protect the Express with ease!

t_ch: 这个好！嘿嘿，看你们以后还敢不敢偷吃列车长的应急干粮～
t_en: This is good! Heehee, let's see if you lot would still dare to steal Pom-Pom's emergency rations!

t_ch: 把我打包送给帕姆吧。
t_en: Just wrap me up and present me to Pom-Pom.

t_ch: 把我打包送给帕姆吧。这样以后我就不用做值日了！
t_en: Wrap me up and give me to Pom-Pom. Then I won't have to be on Express duty!

t_ch: 你不要痴心妄想了，给我好好做值日帕！
t_en: You should drop your daydreams and be a good little duty-to-doer!

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，你迟到了。我们约好一起晨练，但你晚到了整整一个系统时。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, you're late. We agreed to train together in the morning, but you are a whole system hour late.

t_ch: 明明昨天打赌的时候，你还拍着胸脯保证，今早一定能起得来呢！
t_en: When we made a bet yesterday, you confidently proclaimed that you'd definitely be able to wake up on time!

t_ch: 压根没听到闹钟。
t_en: I didn't hear my alarm at all.

t_ch: 既然如此，明天我会直接来叫你起床。
t_en: If that's the case, I'll wake you up tomorrow.

t_ch: 记忆被「忆者」偷走了…
t_en: My memories were stolen by a Memokeeper...

t_ch: 那你放心吧，明早我会破门而入，狠狠提醒你的！
t_en: You've nothing to worry about then — I'll break down your door and wake you up. With violence!

t_ch: 哼哼，不管什么理由，既然迟到了，就必须履行昨天约定的赌约！用你的「列车基金」请我们吃早餐！
t_en: Heh-heh, anyway, since you're late, you have to pay the consequences of the bet! We're using your Express fund to treat ourselves to breakfast!

t_ch: 含泪支付「列车基金」。
t_en: Fight back your tears and fork out your Express fund.

t_ch: 正好晨练累了，去买奶茶喝咯！
t_en: I was all thirsty from our morning routine too. Time to buy some milk tea!

t_ch: 能不能回想一下晨练的意义？
t_en: Did you even understand the whole point of our morning training?

t_ch: 筹码加倍，明天继续！
t_en: Double the stakes! We resume tomorrow!

t_ch: 竟然有这样的决心……
t_en: Such determination...

t_ch: 比起赌约，我还是更希望能和你们一起好好完成晨练计划。
t_en: Instead of a bet, I'd much rather you all properly finish the morning training plan for once.

t_ch: 什么赌约？我咋没印象了？
t_en: What bet? Why don't I remember this?

t_ch: 看本姑娘沙包大的拳头能不能妙手回春！
t_en: Let's see if my fists of steel are capable of restoring your memory!

t_ch: 动手吧，我不会阻止你的。
t_en: Please do. I won't stop you.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，电子竞技没有永远的王朝。你在「超级开拓小子」里使用诡计赢得胜利时，可曾想到本姑娘也有卷土重来的这一天？
t_en: {NICKNAME}, there is no eternal domination in esports. When you executed your filthy scheme to win in the Super Trailblaze Kid, did you ever fathom the day I would rise from the ashes?

t_ch: 我们杨叔可是几十年的老电竞玩家了，身为他的名师高徒，本姑娘收拾你这小朋友岂不是信手拈来？哼哼，准备好接受失败吧！
t_en: Our dear Mr. Yang here has been a seasoned pro-gamer for decades. As his prolific protégé, would it not be a cakewalk to handle a rascal like you? Heh-heh, get ready to taste defeat!

t_ch: 三月，我也曾教过你，不要骄傲，不要轻敌。
t_en: March, I also taught you before not to be arrogant and underestimate your opponent.

t_ch: 杨大师，徒儿谨遵教诲。
t_en: Master Yang, this student will take your teachings to heart.

t_ch: （三月七做足了准备，这回恐怕得认真应对了……）
t_en: (Uh-oh, March 7th has fully prepared for this. I'll have to get serious this time...)

t_ch: 堂堂正正地正面对决。
t_en: Meet the showdown fair and square.

t_ch: 在一场紧张刺激的拉锯战之后，你的屏幕上浮现出「失败」两个大字。
t_en: After a thrilling back-and-forth battle, the large word of "DEFEAT" is plastered on your screen.

t_ch: 哼哼哼！这下知道本姑娘的厉害了吧！
t_en: Heh-heh-heh! Now you know my prowess!

t_ch: 杨大师！也收我为徒吧！
t_en: Master Yang! Please accept me as your student too!

t_ch: 不行，我不同意！都是一个师父，这还怎么对决呀？除非…除非你以后都叫我「师姐」！
t_en: No, I refuse! What sort of fight would it be if we had the same mentor? Unless... Unless you address me as "senior soror" in future!

t_ch: 哈哈，年轻人可真有活力啊。
t_en: Haha, youngsters sure are lively.

t_ch: 偷偷联系银狼代打。
t_en: Secretly contact Silver Wolf to stand in for you.

t_ch: 在一场毫无观赏性的闪电战后，你赢得了一场碾压级的胜利。
t_en: After a blitzkrieg battle devoid of any spectators, you triumph in an overwhelming victory.

t_ch: 不对劲，不对劲！杨叔！{F#她}{M#他}是不是作弊了！怎么变得这么强！
t_en: No, something's off! Mr. Yang! Is {F#she}{M#he} cheating!? How did {F#she}{M#he} suddenly get so strong?

t_ch: 我才不会作弊呢。
t_en: I never cheat.

t_ch: 喂！你怎么擅自跳出来了！
t_en: Hey! You're not supposed to reveal yourself!

t_ch: 竟然找代打…{NICKNAME}，电子竞技讲究公平公正，作弊可不好。你要好好反省一下。
t_en: So you got a stand-in... {NICKNAME}, esports is all about fairness. Cheating is frowned upon. You need to reflect on your actions.

t_ch: 都说了，我没有作弊。
t_en: I already said, I wasn't cheating.

t_ch: 竟然与星核猎手勾结，欺负天真可爱的小三月，太坏了！
t_en: Consorting with a Stellaron Hunter to gang up on my innocent and adorable self, you're a total villain!

t_ch: 顺着网线来打我呀～
t_en: Hah, let's see you fight me on the internet!

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，明天有空吗？
t_en: {NICKNAME}, are you free tomorrow?

t_ch: 要忙着休息。
t_en: I'll be busy taking a break.

t_ch: 「列车基金」攒了多少了？一个月有多少零用钱？年纪轻轻的，正是奋斗的年纪，别把时间花在休息上。明天和本姑娘一起值日吧！
t_en: How much is there in the Express fund? How much petty cash do we have in a month? We're all young and sprightly. It's the best time of our lives to be working hard, not wasting our time on breaks. Come with me for Express duty tomorrow!

t_ch: 怎么突然这么勤快？你不是三月七！你是谁？你把三月七怎么了？
t_en: Why so hardworking suddenly? You aren't March 7th! Who are you? And what have you done with March 7th?

t_ch: 才不是！事情其实是这样——列车长让我明天去打扫一下货运车厢，但那里面黑漆漆的，还总能听到奇怪的异响，我心里有点发毛，想找个人陪我去……
t_en: It's nothing like that! It's actually... Pom-Pom wants me to tidy up the cargo carriage tomorrow, but it's so dark in there, and you can always hear strange noises, which creeps me out. So I was hoping someone would come with me...

t_ch: 可是，明天有机动球大赛的直播，我约了杨叔一起看……
t_en: But, tomorrow's the Roboball Contest finals livestream. I'm catching it with Mr. Yang too...

t_ch: （唔…该怎么说服{NICKNAME}陪我一起值日呢？）
t_en: (Ugh... How do I convince {NICKNAME} to accompany me for Express duty?)

t_ch: 我要画饼！
t_en: I want dibs!

t_ch: 货运车厢里，没准有好多被我们遗忘了的宝贝呢！
t_en: There's probably plenty of nice stuff we forgot about in the cargo carriage!

t_ch: 出发！
t_en: Let's go!

t_ch: 我要贿赂！
t_en: I want a bribe!

t_ch: 这次值日结束以后，我替你值日两次…不，三次！
t_en: After this one, I'll swap two... no, three Express duties with you!

t_ch: 成交！
t_en: Deal!

t_ch: 我要…找杨叔！
t_en: I want... to look for Mr. Yang!

t_ch: 那…我找杨叔一起来帮忙，然后一边打扫一边看比赛，不错吧？
t_en: Then... I'll go get Mr. Yang to help us out. We can watch the finals while we tidy up, not bad, eh?

t_ch: 你可真是个小天才。
t_en: Pretty smart.

t_ch: 一杯少冰的「燃油饮」，一杯全糖的「爱如初见」…「哦哟噗噗号移动奶茶旗舰」的外送服务也太狡猾了，就算加满小料，离起送费也还是差一杯奶茶的价格。
t_en: One cup of O-Fuel with less ice, one cup of First Love with <unbreak>100%</unbreak> sugar... Oh Dearie Puffy Mobile Milk Tea Flagship's delivery service is really sly — even with all add-ons included, it's still the cost of one milk tea order away from the minimum delivery cost.

t_ch: 不如直接去门店买吧。那艘卖奶茶的飞船现在离我们不远。
t_en: Why don't we just head to the store to buy them? That spaceship that sells milk tea isn't far from us.

t_ch: 才不要！列车也难得开到他们的外卖配送范围内！有的时候就是会想要这样的体验：自己舒舒服服地窝在沙发上，想要的东西就能「嗖」地一下递到手边！
t_en: No way! It's not often the Express gets within delivery range of them! Sometimes you just want to enjoy this experience: Comfortably lounging on your sofa, and whatever you want just appearing in your hand with a "poof"!

t_ch: 看来，必须找人凑凑单了——
t_en: Looks like I have to find more people to order with...

t_ch: 选择说服丹恒。
t_en: Try to persuade Dan Heng.

t_ch: 你看你看，他们说喝了这杯「米酿酸奶牛乳茶」，会有大幅度的属性上升！
t_en: Lookie here, they say that your stats will be greatly boosted after drinking this Rice-Brewed Yogurt Milk Tea!

t_ch: 什么属性？「血糖值」吗？
t_en: What stats? Blood glucose level?

t_ch: 选择说服姬子。
t_en: Try to persuade Himeko.

t_ch: 与其喝这些糖水，不如试试我的手调咖啡。
t_en: Why not try my home-brewed coffee instead of downing all that sugar water?

t_ch: 糟糕了！！！{NICKNAME}，快逃！！！
t_en: Oh no!!! {NICKNAME}, run for it!!!

t_ch: 让「闭嘴」做点奶茶好了。
t_en: Might as well have Shush make some milk tea.

t_ch: 仔细想想，咱们家自己就有调饮机器人，何必去买外面的奶茶呢？
t_en: Come to think of it, we've got a drinksmith robot right here. Why would I need milk tea delivery anyway?

t_ch: 不好了！你们快看我拍的这些照片…怎么会这样啊！
t_en: This is bad! You guys, look at the photos I shot... How did they end up like this!

t_ch: 我软磨硬泡了好久，姬子姐姐才答应抽空当我的模特。可刚换新镜头，我还没适应用法，拍出的照片都有些奇怪……
t_en: I had to grovel and beg for so long before Himeko finally agreed to take some time off to be my model. But I just changed my lens, and I haven't gotten used to it yet — the photos came out all weird...

t_ch: 这些没对准焦距，后边飞过的小鸟倒拍得很清楚。
t_en: They're out of focus. At least you captured the birds flying in the background in ultra-res.

t_ch: 这些过度曝光了，姬子姐姐白得在反光！
t_en: These are overexposed. Himeko looks so pale that she's practically blinding!

t_ch: 唔，三月七乘客， 帕姆觉得你需要慎重考虑该给姬子哪一份照片……
t_en: Err, March 7th, Pom-Pom thinks you should consider very carefully which photo you wish to give to Himeko...

t_ch: 没对上焦的。
t_en: The out-of-focus ones.

t_ch: 很有氛围感呢，我很喜欢。多谢你啦，小三月。
t_en: They've got a great vibe. I love these. Thanks, March.

t_ch: 过度曝光的。
t_en: The overexposed ones.

t_ch: 像是加了滤镜呢，我很喜欢。多谢你啦，小三月。
t_en: It's like they got a filter over them. I love it. Thanks a lot, March.

t_ch: 难道本姑娘真的是摄影天才！
t_en: Could I actually be a photography prodigy!?

t_ch: 今天是谁值日？地上怎么这么多水！刚才差点摔了一跤帕！
t_en: Whose turn is it for Express duty today? Why's the floor so wet! Pom-Pom almost fell flat on Pom-Pom's bum!

t_ch: 抱歉，我突发奇想，想用云吟术清理地面灰尘。但…有些没掌握好力度。给各位添麻烦了。
t_en: Sorry, I suddenly had the bright idea to use cloudhymn magic to clean the dust. But... I didn't quite get the potency right. Apologies for the trouble.

t_ch: 原来是这样帕…那列车长也不怪你啦，丹恒乘客。但请你把地上的积水清理干净吧！
t_en: Pom-Pom sees... won't blame you then, Dan Heng. But please clean up the remnant water!

t_ch: 马上要到晚餐时间了，却要清理这么多积水…真惨啊，丹恒老师。
t_en: It's almost dinner time, but you have to dry the floor... You're such a poor thing, Dan Heng.

t_ch: 要不要试试用云吟术清理积水？
t_en: How about using cloudhymn magic to clean up the water?

t_ch: 还是别再试了吧！要是再失败一次，列车就要变成水车了帕！
t_en: You'd better not! If you fail one more time, the Express would turn into an underwater train!

t_ch: （嗯…自己犯的错，自己就要想办法解决。该怎么办呢？）
t_en: (Mm... I must solve my own messes. What should I do?)

t_ch: 老老实实清理积水。
t_en: Suck it up and dry the floor normally.

t_ch: 抱歉，晚餐不用等我了，你们先吃吧。我打扫完车厢里的积水再过来。
t_en: Sorry, don't wait up for me for dinner. You all can dine first. I'll be over once I'm done with the carriage.

t_ch: 好吧…那你加油打扫帕。
t_en: All right... Good luck with the clean-up then.

t_ch: 真拿你没办法呀，丹恒老师～{NICKNAME}，快来和丹恒一起打扫积水吧！
t_en: You sure are hopeless, Dan Heng. {NICKNAME}, get over here and mop up the water with Dan Heng!

t_ch: 嗯，速战速决！一起去吃饭！
t_en: On it, fast and furious! Let's eat dinner together!

t_ch: …谢谢你们。
t_en: ...Thank you all.

t_ch: 真拿你们没办法。我会稍微晚点再开饭，你们快点打扫帕！
t_en: You lot sure don't make things easy. Pom-Pom will start dinner later, so hurry up and clean up, pom!

t_ch: 冒险再次使用云吟术。
t_en: Risk it and use cloudhymn magic again.

t_ch: 看来，只能再试一次云吟术了……
t_en: Looks like I'll just have to try cloudhymn magic again...

t_ch: 喂喂喂，谨慎啊丹恒！列车长真的要愤怒了！
t_en: Hey, hey, hey, careful with that, Dan Heng! The conductor's gonna get really mad!

t_ch: 洞天隐月，苍龙濯世！
t_en: Delve-hidden moon, world-cleansing dragon!

t_ch: 哦哦哦！燃起来了！
t_en: Wooo! It's on fire!

t_ch: 不要啊！丹恒乘客！
t_en: Noooo! Dan Heng!

t_ch: 清水如臂使指，绸缎般拂拭地面，掀起灰尘和污垢，重新注入桶中。
t_en: Clear water flowing as sleek as a guided hand, mopping the floor smooth as silk, lifting up dust and dirt, then back into the bucket again.

t_ch: 竟然…成功了？
t_en: You... did it?

t_ch: 嗯，逐渐掌握窍门了。以后也可以用这招来打扫卫生了。
t_en: Yes, I think I'm getting the hang of it. I can use this move again to clean in the future.

t_ch: 不许再用了帕！
t_en: No more of this! Ever!

t_ch: 丹恒！吓我一跳，你怎么鬼鬼祟祟的？偷感好重！难道是…半夜来偷吃夜宵的？来吧小伙儿，想吃啥？我陪你一起吃！嘿嘿，放心吧，我不会说出去的～
t_en: Dan Heng! You startled me. What're you doing skulking around, radiating mad stalker vibes? Could you be... secretly stealing about for a midnight snack? All right, you scamp, what do you want? I'll eat it with you! Heh-heh, don't worry, I won't breathe a word...

t_ch: 不，我是来找东西的。必须在明天之前找到…姬子的「创意菜食谱」……
t_en: No, I was looking for something. Before tomorrow comes, I have to find... Himeko's Creative Cuisine Cookbook...

t_ch: 找到了，就在这儿。
t_en: Found it. It's right here.

t_ch: 啊？姬子又打算在餐饮的道路上「开拓」了？
t_en: Eh? Himeko's going to trailblaze on the gastronomic path again?

t_ch: 没错。而且据列车长线报，她打算在明天晚餐时付诸实践。
t_en: Correct. And according to the conductor's intel, she's going to put it to the test at tomorrow's dinner.

t_ch: 油炸西瓜条、爆炒天蛾丝烩饭、油封咖啡豆鸭腿……
t_en: Deep-fried Watermelon Sticks, Explosive Stir-fried Shredded Skymoth Risotto, Confit Coffee Bean Duck Legs...

t_ch: 必须阻止她！
t_en: We must stop her!

t_ch: 但是，该怎么做才比较妥当呢……
t_en: But, how do we do it more subtly...

t_ch: 略略修改。
t_en: Revise the recipes a little.

t_ch: 清炒西瓜皮，糖熬生姜片，水煮咖啡豆…这么修改，应该没有什么痕迹吧？
t_en: Sautéed Watermelon Skin, Sugar-boiled Ginger Slices, Poached Coffee Beans... You think she would notice if I made these changes?

t_ch: 好像变成仙舟风格的药膳了？唔…至少能吃！
t_en: These sound more like Xianzhou's herbal recipes? Mm... at least it's edible!

t_ch: 通通删除！
t_en: Erase them all!

t_ch: 这样的菜谱，还是从世上消失为好。是非对错，就由我一人承担。
t_en: Such recipes should be eternally removed for the good of mankind. For better or worse, I will shoulder the sole responsibility.

t_ch: 丹恒老师！好壮烈…只能祈祷姬子姐姐贵人多忘事了。
t_en: Dan Heng! Such heroic sacrifice... I only pray Himeko's a forgetful altruist.

t_ch: 更换一新。
t_en: Time for an overhaul.

t_ch: 翡翠玲珑瓜皮切，椒盐脍炙生姜片…不是，怎么还是西瓜皮和生姜片？
t_en: Julienned Jade Melon Peels, Peppered and Spiced Ginger Slices... Wait, why is it watermelon skin and ginger slices again?

t_ch: 没办法，食材有限。我已经尽力了。
t_en: Can't be helped. That's all the ingredients we have. I've tried my best.

t_ch: 「还迷信学术权威呢？哈那德是个剽窃的小贼，利尔他也不过为了骗点经费。」
t_en: "Still believe in academic authority? Harald is a plagiarizing little thief, and Aiden just wants to swindle the meager funding."

t_ch: 「虚数之树呢，更是彻头彻尾的骗局。你见过树杈吗？你见过树叶吗？其实宇宙是平的，是张『虚数之饼』！」
t_en: "As for the Imaginary Tree, it's the biggest scam of them all, through and through. Have you seen its tree branch? Or leaf? In reality, the universe is flat — it's an Imaginary Pancake!"

t_ch: 可恶…丹恒，这人这么评论你的科普文章，是我的话，一定狠狠骂他一顿！
t_en: Dang... Dan Heng, just read this person's scathing comments on your scientific article. If it were me, I'd definitely give him a thorough dressing-down!

t_ch: 即使如此，也应该冷静。把道理讲清楚就够了。若他还是胡搅蛮缠，也不必再理睬了。
t_en: Even if that's the case, you should still remain calm. It's sufficient to just use reason. If he's still spouting rubbish, we can just ignore him.

t_ch: 交给三月发挥。
t_en: Leave it to March to concoct a response.

t_ch: 看我大展身手：「一边玩儿去吧，幼儿园毕业再来说话。」
t_en: Time to flaunt my wordsmithery: "Go play with your toys somewhere else. Come back and comment when you've graduated from kindergarten."

t_ch: 然后把他拉黑…大获全胜！
t_en: And then I'll block him... Total victory!

t_ch: 看来年轻人有年轻人的处事方针。这倒是也不错。
t_en: It appears young people have their way of handling affairs. That's not such a bad thing.

t_ch: 提出礼貌建议。
t_en: Provide polite suggestions.

t_ch: 我给他推荐了几本参考书，还简单讲了一些科学史的常识…他却回复说：「急了急了！还让我多读点书呢，你自己看过吗就推荐？」
t_en: I recommended some reference books to him, and briefly explained some knowledge on basic science history... Yet he had the gall to reply: "Ooh now I'm mad! And you still want me to read even more books? Have you even read your own recommendations?"

t_ch: 对面果然开始胡搅蛮缠了！
t_en: As expected, the commenter's started to spew more drivel!

t_ch: 他只是自知理亏，诉诸情绪来精神胜利罢了。不必放在心上。
t_en: He just knows he's losing the debate, and is resorting to emotional arguments for a psychological victory. No need to take it to heart.

t_ch: 相约线下交流。
t_en: Arrange to meet offline for a chat.

t_ch: 不如这样吧…「线上交流难免失真，不如线下一起喝杯茶，我可以当面给你讲解『树海理论』。」
t_en: How about this... "Context in online communications might be lost in translation. How about meeting for a cup of tea — I can personally elaborate on the Sea of Trees Theory to you."

t_ch: 我只是想把道理当面讲清楚，他怎么开始跟我道歉了？
t_en: I just wish to clearly explain my reasoning in person. Why did he start apologizing to me?

t_ch: 你用操练长枪的照片当头像，任谁都会害怕的。
t_en: Your profile pic is one of you practicing the spear. Who wouldn't be afraid of you?

t_ch: 三月，你来得正好。我一早起来找不到眼镜了，你们或许在哪见过？
t_en: March, you're here just in time. I haven't been able to find my glasses the whole morning. Maybe you've seen them somewhere?

t_ch: 哼哼，杨叔也有马虎的时候呢。咱们来推理一下，杨叔最后一次摘眼镜是什么时候，之后又发生了什么？
t_en: Heh-heh, so Mr. Yang also has his careless moments. Let's put our thinking caps on: When was the last time you removed your glasses, and what happened after that?

t_ch: 嗯…昨晚，我在房间里画画的时候，换上了保护视力的专用眼镜。这一点我记得十分清晰。
t_en: Hmm... When I was drawing in my room last night, I switched to my special protective glasses. This I remember clearly.

t_ch: 之后我冲了个澡，在床上看动画，看着看着就睡着了。
t_en: After that, I took a shower, read some comics in bed, and then fell asleep halfway through.

t_ch: 这么说来的话，眼镜应该……
t_en: That means to say, the glasses should be...

t_ch: 在办公桌上。
t_en: On the office desk.

t_ch: 也就是说，眼镜还留在我的办公桌上！
t_en: Which also means, I left my glasses on my desk!

t_ch: 在洗漱池上。
t_en: On the bathroom sink.

t_ch: 也就是说，眼镜还留在洗漱池上！
t_en: Which also means, my glasses are still on the toilet sink!

t_ch: 在床上！
t_en: On the bed!

t_ch: 也就是说，眼镜其实就在我的床上！
t_en: Which also means, my glasses are still on my bed!

t_ch: 看来破案了，真不愧是我名侦探三月七～
t_en: Looks like the case is solved! Just another day for the famous detective March 7th!

t_ch: 你们在做什么？
t_en: What are you people up to?

t_ch: 杨叔的眼镜不见了，我正在帮他寻找呢！
t_en: Mr. Yang's glasses are missing. I'm helping him find them!

t_ch: 不是就在他脸上吗？
t_en: Aren't they on his face?

t_ch: 啊！
t_en: Ahhhh!

t_ch: 抱歉，是我犯糊涂了。眼镜戴久了，就成了身体的一部分……
t_en: Sorry, I got confused. After wearing them for so long, they feel like part of your body...

t_ch: 丹恒老师，你才是真正的名侦探啊！推理能力也太强了叭！
t_en: Dan Heng, you're the true detective! Your deduction skills are brilliant!

t_ch: 不，这和「推理」没关系吧……
t_en: No, I don't think this has anything to do with deduction...

t_ch: 《魔剑神机•阿拉哈托》真的太好看了！好想驾驶巨型机器人斩妖除魔啊！
t_en: Blade of Chaos: Arahato is so good! I wanna pilot a giant mecha and vanquish demons too!

t_ch: 确实好看。就是「庆典之王」的那集有点…没太看懂……
t_en: It is pretty good. Except for that "Celebration King" episode... I didn't really understand it...

t_ch: 那应该只是彩蛋性质的搞笑集吧。
t_en: That was probably just some parody episode with Easter eggs in it.

t_ch: 杨叔，你不是说还有很多部《魔剑神机》吗？我还想看！
t_en: Mr. Yang, didn't you say that there were plenty more in the Blade of Chaos series? I want to watch more!

t_ch: 唔…我虽然可以用自己的「力量」复原动画剧集，可这无中生有的工作颇为耗费精力，难以一蹴而就。要想看到另一部作品，恐怕要请你们多等上一段时间了。
t_en: Mm... I can indeed use my "power" to restore the animated series, but such tasks of creating something from nothing drains me greatly, so it's not possible in one sitting. If you want to watch another series, I'm afraid you'll have to wait a while.

t_ch: 不过，我以故乡的真实事件为蓝本，制作了几集短篇动画，倒是可以先让你们解解馋。
t_en: However, using real events that happened in my home as blueprints, I created a few animated shorts. These can probably tide you over for a while.

t_ch: 我想想，给你们放哪一部动画比较好呢？
t_en: Let's see. Which animation do I put on for you?

t_ch: 关于一群剑侠的动画。
t_en: The one about a group of swordsages.

t_ch: 「举手投足皆是习武，静极不动亦是练剑，此即『浑然天成』。」
t_en: "Every gesture is a stroke of martial art. Even in stillness, the sword is being trained — the pinnacle of natural harmony."

t_ch: 对对对，我也喜欢这句！
t_en: Yeah, I like this line too!

t_ch: 有几位登场人物，看上去颇为眼熟…瓦尔特先生是参考了现实原型吗？
t_en: Some of the characters have familiar faces... Did Mr. Yang reference their real-life counterparts?

t_ch: 可以这样说吧。不过，「现实原型」并不是你们也认识的那些人。
t_en: You could say that, but you wouldn't know their "real-life counterparts" anyway.

t_ch: 关于某个组织建立的动画。
t_en: The one about the establishment of a certain organization.

t_ch: 「苍白的死神平等地叩响穷人房舍的小门和国王宫殿的大门。」
t_en: "Pale death kicks with impartial foot at the hovels of the poor and the towers of kings."

t_ch: 真是发人深省的台词呀……
t_en: What a profound line...

t_ch: 哈哈，可惜并非我原创的警句。
t_en: Haha, I regret to confess that it's not an original line from me.

t_ch: 没想到杨叔过去的经历，竟然有这么曲折离奇。真是越来越佩服你了！
t_en: I never knew Mr. Yang's past was so full of twists and turns. I'm starting to admire you even more!

t_ch: 不必太当真。这毕竟是动画，有不少夸张演绎和艺术加工。
t_en: No need to take them seriously. It's just an animation — plenty of embellishments and creative polish went into it.

t_ch: 关于寻找某位女武神的动画。
t_en: The one about a certain valkyrie.

t_ch: 「我是时空本身，是摧毁一切的力量之源，我的责任就是将诸般世界归于湮灭。」
t_en: "I am Time itself, the source capable of absolute annihilation. My duty is to deliver various worlds unto obliteration."

t_ch: 好帅的台词，好想说一次看看！
t_en: What a cool line! I want to say it once too!

t_ch: 没错没错，太酷炫了～
t_en: Yeah, it was super cool!

t_ch: 瓦尔特先生，你的动画把孩子们教育成泯灭帮了。
t_en: Mr. Yang, your animations are turning the kids into the Annihilation Gang.

t_ch: 哈哈哈，可不能把教育失败的责任推到动画上面啊！
t_en: Hahaha, you mustn't blame a child's failed education on anime!

t_ch: 话说回来，你们有没有觉得那个金色头发的角色，说话的声音和「闭嘴」一模一样……
t_en: That being said, do you guys feel like that blond character's voice sounds exactly like Shush's...?

t_ch: 请别用那种眼神看着我，亲爱的无名客们！向阿基维利起誓，我和动画里的那个人完全不一样！
t_en: Please don't look at me with such eyes, my dear Nameless! I vow on Akivili's name that I am a complete contrast to that person in the animation!

t_ch: 丹恒乘客，昨天半夜你怎么在车厢里到处逛啊？是失眠了吗？
t_en: Dan Heng, what were you doing pacing about in the carriage last night? Couldn't sleep?

t_ch: 抱歉，列车长，昨晚做了个噩梦，不太睡得着。
t_en: My apologies, conductor. I had a nightmare, and was hard-pressed to return to slumber.

t_ch: 哦？噩梦？我略懂一些精神分析学，如果你感兴趣，我可以尝试帮你找一找噩梦的源头。方便讲讲你做了什么梦吗？
t_en: Oh? A nightmare? I know a little about psychoanalysis. If you're interested, I could try to help you find the source of your nightmare. Care to tell me what you dreamed about?

t_ch: 唔，说来有点丢脸…我昨晚梦见列车长抢走了我的枪，把它改造成了一个扫把。我想要回来，列车长就凶巴巴地吼我——就是这样一个莫名其妙的噩梦。
t_en: Mm, it's a little embarrassing... I dreamt that the conductor took my spear and turned it into a broom. I wanted to get it back, but the conductor yelled at me with fearsome anger... It was such a bizarre nightmare.

t_ch: 见笑了。你们也知道，梦都是没什么逻辑的……
t_en: You must think me quite the joke. You all also know that dreams are illogical surrealities...

t_ch: 没关系，大家都做过莫名其妙的噩梦，没人会因此而笑话你的。我想想…做了这样的梦，一定是因为你……
t_en: It's fine. Everyone's had strange nightmares before. No one's going to laugh at you because of that. Let me think... to have had such a dream, it must be because you...

t_ch: …缺乏安全感。
t_en: ...are insecure.

t_ch: 你梦到自己失去了武器，这说明在内心深处，你一直感到恐慌和不安。
t_en: You dreamt you lost your weapon. This means that subconsciously, you've always been panicky and ill at ease.

t_ch: …的确，我总担心自己没办法保护好大家。
t_en: ...Indeed, I always fear I am incapable of protecting everyone.

t_ch: 不必那么担心啦，丹恒乘客！瓦尔特乘客也是很强的帕～
t_en: No need to worry, Dan Heng! Welt is also very strong!

t_ch: 而且，只有保证好睡眠质量，才能保证应对紧急情况时的精神状态，对吧？
t_en: Also, you need a good night's sleep to ensure that you're in the best mental shape when emergencies arise, no?

t_ch: 真不愧是瓦尔特先生，竟还有这释梦的本领…谢谢你们，我会调整好精神状态的。
t_en: You're truly erudite, Mr. Yang, to possess the ability to interpret dreams... Thank you all, and I will adjust my mindset accordingly.

t_ch: …发现列车上的扫把太旧了。
t_en: ...noticed that the broom on the Express is too worn-out.

t_ch: 你梦到自己的武器被改造成扫把，说明你和我一样，注意到列车上现在用的扫把太旧了。
t_en: You dreamt that your weapon was turned into a broom. That means you're just like me — you noticed the broom we have now is too old.

t_ch: 梦到列车长凶巴巴地吼你，恐怕是因为列车长素来勤俭节约，不舍得丢弃旧工具，你也因此不敢和它提起「换扫把」的事。
t_en: And for the conductor to be yelling at you, that's probably because they've always been thrifty, thus unwilling to discard old tools. This is also why you daren't bring up the matter of changing our tools.

t_ch: …唉，但那个扫把真的太旧了，甚至会掉渣。简直是一边扫地，一边制造新的灰尘。
t_en: ...*sigh* But that broom really is too old — it's even shedding its bristles everywhere. Every time it sweeps the floor, it creates a new layer of dust.

t_ch: 列车长，还是把这种历史文物放进收藏柜吧…是时候购置些更高效的清洁设备了。
t_en: Conductor, best to retire this historical relic to the storage closet... It's time to procure some more effective cleaning tools.

t_ch: 真拿你们没办法…列车长会考虑这个提议的帕。
t_en: So many demands... I shall consider this suggestion.

t_ch: 等等，不对劲帕。怎么感觉你们两个是专门跑过来一唱一和地劝我换掉扫把的呢？
t_en: Hang on, this isn't right. Why does this conversation feel like you two discussed it beforehand, just to persuade me to change the broom?

t_ch: 最近帕姆经常在绿植里面发现奇怪的残渣。帕姆蹲守了一夜，终于抓到了那位往绿植里倒东西的神秘人——
t_en: These days, Pom-Pom would regularly find strange residue in the plants. Pom-Pom stayed up the whole night, eventually catching that mystery person who had been pouring trash into the plants...

t_ch: 姬子乘客！
t_en: Himeko!

t_ch: 你可以保持沉默，但你说的每一句话都会成为呈堂证供。现在请回答列车长的问题，那些残渣到底是什么？
t_en: You have the right to remain silent, but everything you say will be used against you in the court of law. Now, please answer my question: What exactly is this residue?

t_ch: 咖啡渣。
t_en: Coffee grounds.

t_ch: 实在抱歉，有时我泡完咖啡，就顺手把咖啡渣倒进了绿植里面……
t_en: I'm really sorry. Sometimes, when I finish brewing coffee, I would pour the coffee grounds into the plants...

t_ch: 唔，原来如此…难怪这些绿植越来越茁壮了，一定是这些肥料的缘故帕。
t_en: Oh, I see... No wonder the plants are growing more verdantly these days. It must be because of this fertilizer.

t_ch: 领航员以身作则，不浪费任何废弃的咖啡渣，值得表扬。本周的「环保之星」非你莫属了！
t_en: The navigator leads by example in not wasting any discarded coffee grounds. That is worth commending. This week's Environmental Star award belongs to you!

t_ch: 很荣幸，但…我们还有这种奖项吗？
t_en: I'm honored, but... was there such an award before?

t_ch: 列车长刚刚专门为你设立的帕～
t_en: I only just invented it for you!

t_ch: 失败的菜肴。
t_en: Failures of cooking.

t_ch: 实在抱歉，其实我这几天在偷偷研究创意菜。有些成品实在太过失败，又怕被大家发现，就倒进了绿植里……
t_en: I'm really sorry, but I've been secretly inventing new dishes recently. Some of them were total failures, and I was afraid they'd be discovered, so I tossed them in the plants...

t_ch: 喔！这些绿植最近变得无精打采，终于让列车长找到原因了帕！
t_en: Oh! So that's why these plants have been all gloom-and-doom lately. I've finally found it!

t_ch: 研究创意料理是好事，但可不能浪费食物呀。就算是失败品，也要好好全部吃掉！本周帕姆不得不授予你「浪费之星」，以示惩戒帕！
t_en: Creating new cuisine is good, but you shouldn't waste food. Even if they turn out to be failures, you should still eat them all up! As punishment, I have no choice but to bequeath this week's Wasteful Star award to you!

t_ch: 很惭愧，但…我们还有这种「奖项」吗？
t_en: I'm ashamed, but... did we have such an award before?

t_ch: 列车长刚刚专门为你设立的帕～
t_en: I only just invented it for you!

t_ch: 今天，将由我亲自下厨，为各位乘客烹饪一席充满创意的午餐。你们准备好了吗？
t_en: I'll be the chef for today to prepare a sumptuous lunch for all passengers. Are you all ready?

t_ch: 来吧，我已经做好心理准备了！
t_en: Bring it! My mind and body are ready!

t_ch: 杨叔人呢？
t_en: Where's Mr. Yang?

t_ch: 早就逃了……
t_en: He fled long ago...

t_ch: 这个老油条……
t_en: That old weasel...

t_ch: 你们别这样。我看这原料都是正常的原料，再糟糕能糟糕到哪里去呢？姬子小姐难得下厨，大家给点面子嘛！
t_en: Come on, guys. These are all normal ingredients. How bad can it be? It's rare that Himeko is cooking, so let's show her some respect!

t_ch: 稍等，我再复习一遍菜单。
t_en: Hold on. Let me practice the recipe again.

t_ch: 下锅热油后放凉…要多凉呢？黄油融化时加入…是指开始融化还是完全融化时？这瓶是盐吧？我尝尝…哦，是洗衣粉……
t_en: Heat the oil in the pan, then let it cool... How cool though? When the butter is melting, add... Does it mean when it starts to melt or has fully melted? This bottle is salt, right? Let me try... Oh, it's detergent...

t_ch: 洗衣粉为什么会出现在这里…我收回前言！丹恒老师，救救大家！
t_en: Why would there be detergent here... I take back what I said! Dan Heng, heeeelllp!

t_ch: 呃，没办法了…姬子小姐，需要我来打下手吗？
t_en: Err, guess there's no dodging this one... Do you need me to help you prep, Himeko?

t_ch: （唔，我该让他帮忙吗？）
t_en: (Mm, should I let him help?)

t_ch: 主厨的尊严要求你独立完成！
t_en: The chef's dignity requires that you finish this alone!

t_ch: 不必了，丹恒。你为列车操劳了太多，也该让我慰劳一下你了。安心享受美食吧。
t_en: No need, Dan Heng. You've worked so hard for the Express, and it's my turn to thank you. Please enjoy your food in peace.

t_ch: 我尽力了。
t_en: I tried my best.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}！靠你了，快想想办法！
t_en: {NICKNAME}! It's up to you now. Do something!

t_ch: 呃…你自己怎么不想办法…有了！只能这样了——
t_en: Err... Why don't you do something... I've got it! This is the only way...

t_ch: 啊哈哈！突然想起来，我有一张「沃霍尔美食舰队」满<unbreak>300</unbreak>返<unbreak>1000</unbreak>的开业酬宾优惠券，再过3个系统时就过期了！舰队离我们有点远，我们得赶紧出发了！
t_en: Ahaha! I suddenly remembered that I've got a grand opening promotion coupon for the Warhol Gourmet Fleet! Spend <unbreak>300</unbreak> in food gets you <unbreak>1000</unbreak> off your bill! And it expires in 3 system hours! The fleet's quite far from us, so we have to set off now!

t_ch: 三位！还没有品尝菜品就提前离席，是一种非常不礼貌的行为。
t_en: Hey! Leaving before you've tried my dishes... that's awfully rude.

t_ch: 是，主厨！
t_en: Yes, chef!

t_ch: 偶尔接受一下帮助也挺好的。
t_en: It's okay to receive help sometimes.

t_ch: 那就麻烦你了，丹恒。
t_en: Appreciate the trouble then, Dan Heng.

t_ch: 嗯…这道「干炸水蝠配巨噬花萼」…要不就算了吧？
t_en: Erm... This "Deep-fried Water Bat with Giantmaw Calyx"... How about we just forget it?

t_ch: 绝对不行！这可是今天的主菜，我试验了很多次才成功呢。
t_en: Absolutely not! This is today's main dish. I tried many times before succeeding.

t_ch: 是，主厨……
t_en: Yes, chef...

t_ch: 滋滋滋…滋滋滋…滋滋滋……
t_en: Zzzt... Zzzt... Zzzt...

t_ch: 唔，你们在做什么呢？是「闭嘴」出什么故障了吗？
t_en: Err, what're you guys doing? Is something wrong with Shush?

t_ch: 亲爱的无名客…滋滋滋…我作为餐饮机器人，在清洁功能上尚有欠缺…滋滋滋…姬子小姐正在对此进行调整。
t_en: Dear Nameless... Zzt... As a catering robot, I am lacking in cleaning functions... Zzt... Miss Himeko is making calibrations right now.

t_ch: 姬子小姐正准备接管部分系统，通过手动操作输入数据，以供拟真智能元件学习。
t_en: Miss Himeko is preparing to take over parts of the system, then manually input the data for the AI components to learn from.

t_ch: 我已经给「闭嘴」接上了手柄。不过，我还得实验一下，才能确定手柄键位是如何映射的……
t_en: I've already attached the controller to Shush, but I still have to test it to see how the controller's key mapping is emulated...

t_ch: 点击确认键。
t_en: Tap the OK button.

t_ch: 「闭嘴」一阵颤抖，进入了睡眠模式。
t_en: Shush shudders for a moment, then enters sleep mode.

t_ch: 怎么进入睡眠模式了…这到底是怎么设置的？
t_en: Why did it enter sleep mode... How exactly was it set up?

t_ch: 这大概要问它那位「前任主人」了……
t_en: This is probably a question for its previous owner...

t_ch: 点击取消键。
t_en: Tap the Cancel button.

t_ch: 「闭嘴」一阵颤抖，取出一杯冰饮。
t_en: Shush shudders for a moment, then takes out an iced beverage.

t_ch: 嗯？这映射怎么是反的？真别扭啊……
t_en: Eh? Why is this mapping in reverse? So awkward...

t_ch: 但至少有饮料可以喝，不算失败。
t_en: At least there's something to drink, so it's not a total loss.

t_ch: 上上下下左右左右BA…
t_en: Up-up-down-down-left-right-left-right-B-A...

t_ch: 作弊码正确！即将进入自爆模式，亲爱的无名客，我们下个永劫回归再会！
t_en: Cheat code correct! Now entering self-destruct mode. Dear Nameless, we shall meet again in the next cycle of the universe!

t_ch: 唔哇哇哇！怎么回事！姬子姐，快按取消键！
t_en: Uwaahhh! What's going on! Himeko, hurry up and hit the cancel button!

t_ch: 别担心，这只是前任主人设计的「作弊码笑话」，你们还喜欢吗？
t_en: Don't worry. This is the previous owner's idea of a "cheat code joke." Did you guys like it?

t_ch: 姬子表情平静，甚至带着一丝释怀的微笑。但仔细观察就会发现，她气得双手发抖、青筋暴起。
t_en: Himeko's expression is calm, even with a hint of a faint smile. But careful observation would reveal that her hands are clenched in furious anger, their veins bulging.

t_ch: 你的前任主人…我一定会找到他的。
t_en: Your previous owner... I will be sure to find him.

t_ch: 到时候指定没他好果子吃！
t_en: He will suffer for his indiscretions when that time comes!

t_ch: 呼～眼前的工作终于暂告一段落了，喝杯咖啡休息一下吧。
t_en: Phew, the work at hand is finally coming to a temporary close. Time for a coffee break.

t_ch: 让我挑一首适合咖啡时光的音乐…就这首吧，《尘世乐园》。
t_en: I'll choose some music that fits the ambience of a coffee break... This will do, This Side of Paradise.

t_ch: 今天稍微有点没干劲。还是来点激昂的音乐提振一下精神吧。
t_en: I'm not really feeling up for work today. Maybe some blood-pumping music might lift my spirits.

t_ch: 放什么好呢？就这首《野火》吧。
t_en: What should I put on? This Wildfire should be good.

t_ch: 今天好悠闲～这样悠闲的日子，还是要听点温柔的歌。换这首吧，《使一颗心免于哀伤》～
t_en: What a leisurely day... On such a lazy day, cozy tunes are the best. I'll change to this one, If I Can Stop One Heart From Breaking!

t_ch: 呜哇～太好听了叭！简直就是天籁！
t_en: Woowww, so good! Divine music to my ears!

t_ch: 好闲啊，没什么事做。闲着也是闲着，给留声机换首歌吧。
t_en: So bored, and nothing to do. Might as well change the song on the phonograph.

t_ch: 播放《灾虐的黎明》。
t_en: Play Dawn of Disaster.

t_ch: 列车需要一些*毁灭*。
t_en: The Express needs some Destruction.

t_ch: 播放《踏上旅途》。
t_en: Play Take the Journey.

t_ch: 列车需要一些*开拓*。
t_en: The Express needs some Trailblaze.

t_ch: 播放《科幻小说》。
t_en: Play Science Fiction.

t_ch: 列车需要一些*智识*。
t_en: The Express needs some Erudition.

t_ch: 怎么每个人进来都要切歌？帕姆已经一整天都没完整听完任何一首歌了帕！帕姆生气了！今天谁都不许再碰留声机了！
t_en: Why does everyone keep changing songs? I haven't listened to a complete song the entire day! Ooh, I'm mad! No one is allowed to touch the phonograph today!

t_ch: 列车需要一些*秩序*。
t_en: The Express needs some Order.

t_ch: 紧急通知一个坏消息——列车刚才受到了高能粒子流的撞击，虽然整体上并无大碍，但食物储藏库的制冷系统已经完全失效了。
t_en: An urgent piece of bad news — the Express has just suffered a high-energy particle collision. We're generally okay, but our food storage's cooling system is totally out.

t_ch: 制冷系统失效，冷藏库就危险了！其他食材倒是能顶得住，但冰淇淋…冰淇淋会全部化成水的帕！
t_en: With the cooling system down, the freezing unit is in danger! The other foodstuff should probably be fine, but the ice cream... they'll all be melted!

t_ch: 三月七出手。
t_en: Send March 7th.

t_ch: 别担心，列车长～你忘了神通广大的小三月最擅长什么了？看我用六相冰拯救冰淇淋！
t_en: Fret not, conductor! Have you forgotten what the brilliant lil' March is best at? I'll save the ice cream with my Six-Phased Ice!

t_ch: 三月乘客的技能，竟然在意想不到的地方发挥了重要作用，列车长好感动！
t_en: March, your skills have played an unexpectedly crucial role in this matter. I am truly touched!

t_ch: 瓦尔特出手。
t_en: Send Welt.

t_ch: 这样吧…我可以创造一个拟造黑洞，用它来吸收热量，暂时保证冷藏库的温度暂时不会上升。
t_en: How about this... I can create an artificial black hole to temporarily ensure that the freezing unit's temperature won't rise.

t_ch: 听起来好危险帕！但是没关系，瓦尔特乘客，我们相信你。
t_en: Sounds super dangerous! But it's fine, Welt. We believe in you.

t_ch: 丹恒出手。
t_en: Send Dan Heng.

t_ch: 其实有个简单的处理方法——先把冷藏品装箱投放到太空，等制冷系统修复后再打捞回来。
t_en: There's actually a simple solution: We first release the packed cold storage items into space, then retrieve them when the cooling system is fixed.

t_ch: 哇～还真是简单有效的措施！不愧是丹恒乘客。
t_en: Wowww, a simple, yet effective measure! That's Dan Heng for you.

t_ch: 姬子出手。
t_en: Send Himeko.

t_ch: 没办法了…看来为了大家的冰淇淋，我得用出些真本事了。列车长，请把我的工具箱拿来。
t_en: No choice then... Looks like I'll have to exert my true skills for everyone's ice cream. Conductor, please bring me my toolbox.

t_ch: 放心吧，我会在冰淇淋化掉之前修好所有设备的。
t_en: Don't worry. I will fix all the appliances before the ice cream completely melts.

t_ch: 太耀眼了，姬子乘客！
t_en: Simply dazzling, Himeko!

t_ch: {NICKNAME}出手。
t_en: Send {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 三月七，没时间解释了，我们走！这次只能靠我们的力量了！
t_en: March 7th, there's no time to explain. We have to go! Everyone's counting on our strength this time!

t_ch: 还是解释一下吧…你要怎么做？
t_en: You'd better explain it still... What're you trying to do?

t_ch: 只要把冰淇淋全部吃光，不就万事大吉了？
t_en: Won't this disaster be averted if we eat all the ice cream?

t_ch: 喔！你真是个天才！我们快过去吧～
t_en: Ooh! You're an actual genius! Let's get to it!

t_ch: 你们给我回来！
t_en: You two, get back here!

t_ch: 有点麻烦了……
t_en: There's a little trouble...

t_ch: 发生甚么事了？
t_en: What happened?

t_ch: 艾丝妲小姐分享给了我一个知识库索引系统。安装之后，智库似乎中病毒了。
t_en: Miss Asta shared a knowledge bank index system with us. After installing it, our data bank seems to be infected with a virus.

t_ch: 搜索敌对物种「幼蛰虫」，第一页都是「专业团队上门除虫，安全环保服务优质！星际和平家政为您服务」之类的广告……
t_en: If you search for the hostile organism Juvenile Sting, the first page is all ads like "Professional pest control team at your doorstep, safe and environmentally-friendly service guaranteed! Interastral Peace Housekeeping at your service"...

t_ch: 搜地名，跳出的都是旅行社；搜派系，跳出的都是面试培训班。
t_en: Search for locations, and travel agencies pop up everywhere. Search for factions, interview training classes appear.

t_ch: 「横扫星际和平三百家子公司，这是我的面试秘诀」、「博识学会核心期刊版面费汇总」、「适合想入团纯美骑士的宝宝的二十座苦修瀑布」……
t_en: "Success across <unbreak>300</unbreak> IPC subsidiaries, these are my interviewing secrets," "Intelligentsia Guild Key Journal Publication Fee Summary," "<unbreak>20</unbreak> training waterfalls for Knights of Beauty aspirants"...

t_ch: 没有加入反物质军团的面试秘诀，这含金量我不是很信服。
t_en: The Antimatter Legion interviewing secrets aren't included — I'm not totally convinced of its worth.

t_ch: 可是我排查后，却并没有在系统中发现病毒植入的痕迹。莫非是索引系统本身的问题？不应该啊……
t_en: But after some troubleshooting, I didn't notice any traces of a virus being implanted in the system. Could the problem lie in the index system itself? It shouldn't...

t_ch: 求助专业人士。
t_en: Request a professional.

t_ch: 星穹列车竟然也纡尊降贵来寻求我的帮助啦～看来真是遇到麻烦了。
t_en: So the mighty Astral Express has dismounted from its high horse to seek my help. Looks like you're really in some deep trouble.

t_ch: 顺便一说，「纡尊降贵」是我最近学会的仙舟成语。特别适合阴阳怪气，很喜欢。
t_en: By the way, "high horse" is a Xianzhou idiom I learned recently. It's very subtle, and I like it a lot.

t_ch: 那你到底帮不帮嘛？
t_en: So will you help or not?

t_ch: 哎呀，急什么，会帮你的啦！让我看看——什么嘛！这不是病毒，而是知识库默认启用的「个性化推荐」功能。
t_en: Gosh, what's the hurry, of course I will! Let's see... Is this it? It's not a virus at all — the knowledge bank has just activated its Personalized Recommendations by default.

t_ch: 给你装个插件屏蔽了。这种小事，没必要我出手吧？再见。
t_en: I've installed a plug-in blocker for you. You didn't actually need me for such a minuscule matter, did you? Goodbye.

t_ch: 难道空间站的科员用的都是这套系统吗？
t_en: Could the space station researchers all be using this system as well?

t_ch: 至少有了这些「面试培训班」，还是很方便跳槽的。
t_en: At least with these interview training classes, it's easy to change jobs.

t_ch: 质问始作俑者。
t_en: Interrogate the original perpetrator.

t_ch: 病毒？我看看…哦！不好意思，这个索引系统是「烛墨学派」开发的。软件本身免费，主要靠同期发售的「无用过滤镜」来盈利。
t_en: A virus? Let me see... Oh! Sorry, this index system was developed by the Candelagraphos. The software's free, and it mainly makes money from the "Unproductive Filter" it sells at the same time.

t_ch: 「无用过滤镜」是什么东西？
t_en: What's an "Unproductive Filter"?

t_ch: 是一种视觉植入物。安装以后，就可以用生成算法屏蔽不想看到的内容。
t_en: It's a type of visual implant. After installing it, you can generate algorithms to block stuff you don't want to see.

t_ch: 其实空间站用的是「黑塔特供版」，没有这些广告，我就把这事给忘了…稍等我联系一下经销商，给你们改成特供版就好。
t_en: But the space station uses the "Special Herta Version" which doesn't have ads, so I forgot about this... Hold on. I'll contact the vendor to switch you guys to the special version.

t_ch: 或者，我们也可以去买个「无用过滤镜」？
t_en: Or, we can also buy an "Unproductive Filter"?

t_ch: 别买，是智商税。
t_en: Don't buy it. It's a scam.

t_ch: 拍一拍然后重启。
t_en: Slap it and restart it.

t_ch: 用手才是「拍」，像你这样用球棒，严格来说是「砸」。
t_en: "Slap" implies you're using your hand. Strictly speaking, as you're using your bat like that, that's called a "smash."

t_ch: 重启失败…呃，似乎被「拍」坏了……
t_en: Restart failed... Err, it looks like it broke from that "slap"...

t_ch: 嗯？列车好像收到了一通其他舰船的通信。是找我们有什么事吗？
t_en: Eh? Looks like the Express received a message from another ship. What can we do for you?

t_ch: 大减价大减价，正品公司货清仓大甩卖，全场<unbreak>10</unbreak>个信用点起，邀请好友拼单有机会获得半价礼金！机会难得，快来抢购吧！
t_en: Major sale! We're having a genuine IPC inventory blowout sale, everything starting at <unbreak>10</unbreak> credits! Invite your friends to order in bulk for a chance to get half-off gift money! It's a rare opportunity, so grab 'em whilst stocks last!

t_ch: 原来是星际行商的广告啊…我们要不要看看他们有什么货？
t_en: It's a traveling merchant ad... Shall we see what they've got?

t_ch: 星际和平公司不会这样在航路上叫卖吧？总觉得…不是假货就是赃物。
t_en: I don't think the IPC would need to hawk its wares out here, would they? I've got a feeling... They're either fake or fenced goods.

t_ch: 可那是半价礼金耶！我们先看看货再说吧～
t_en: But they're giving out half-off! Let's take a look first before deciding, c'mon!

t_ch: 谨慎为妙。
t_en: Best be on your guard.

t_ch: 丹恒乘客说得对。出门在外，还是要警惕奸商帕！
t_en: Dan Heng is right. When traveling, buyer beware!

t_ch: 星穹列车对叫卖声熟视无睹，加速驶离了那艘舰船的通讯范围。
t_en: The Astral Express pays the peddler no heed, and accelerates away from the ship's comms range.

t_ch: 呼…终于清静了帕。
t_en: Phew... It's finally quieted down.

t_ch: 半价礼金！
t_en: Half off, guys!

t_ch: 三月乘客说得对。万一有什么好货，错过了多可惜。回应一下对方的信息吧。
t_en: March is right. It'd be a pity if we missed out on some great buys. I'll respond to their message.

t_ch: 列车组与那艘舰船建立了通讯，开始询问货品内容与价格。
t_en: The Express crew establishes comms with that ship and starts inquiring about the goods catalog and prices.

t_ch: 尊敬的星穹列车，你们竟然企图购买仿冒的星际和平公司货物！这是违法行为！
t_en: Esteemed Astral Express, how dare you attempt to purchase counterfeit IPC goods! This is a crime!

t_ch: 什么！竟然是钓鱼执法？？？太离谱了帕！
t_en: What! It was a trap??? This is outrageous!

t_ch: 昨天我戴着耳机听广播剧，听着听着就睡着了。今早醒过来，发现只剩下右耳耳机了…我把房间翻了个遍，可还是没找着另一只。
t_en: I was listening to a radio drama on my earpieces yesterday, and then I dozed off. When I woke up this morning, I noticed I only had my right earpiece... I flipped the room upside down, but I still didn't find the other one.

t_ch: 好难过，它陪了我这么久，最后竟然这样不告而别……
t_en: I'm so upset — I've used them for the longest time, and I didn't even get to say goodbye...

t_ch: 我们帮你找找！
t_en: We'll help you look!

t_ch: 你们翻遍了三月七的房间，最终在天花板的灯罩中找到了另一只耳机。
t_en: You all rummage through March 7th's room, finally finding the other earpiece in the ceiling lampshade.

t_ch: 容我问一句…这到底是怎么遗失到那里去的？
t_en: Might I ask... How did it even end up there?

t_ch: 呜呜…我睡姿比较差嘛……
t_en: Mmmh... I just have bad sleeping posture...

t_ch: 你可真是个武林高手。
t_en: You're a real martial expert.

t_ch: 偷偷重买一只。
t_en: Secretly buy a replacement.

t_ch: 你们声称在地砖缝隙里找到了耳机，实则偷偷重新买了一只。
t_en: You all claim to have found it in one of the floor tiles' crevices, when in reality you bought a replacement.

t_ch: 我们找到了。
t_en: We found it.

t_ch: 哇！感谢你们…嗯？不对，这和我的那个似乎不是一个型号？
t_en: Wahh! Thank you all... Hmm? Wait, this is a different model from mine?

t_ch: 糟了，好像买错了。
t_en: Uh-oh, I think we bought the wrong one.

t_ch: 买错了？难道，是你们重新给我买了一只？
t_en: Bought the wrong one? Did you guys buy another one for me?

t_ch: 唔，竟然暴露了！
t_en: Ugh, we've been exposed!

t_ch: 嘿嘿，不管怎么说，多谢你们啦！我会好好珍惜这只耳机的～就算把自己弄丢了，都不会把它弄丢的！
t_en: Heehee, it doesn't matter. Thank you! I will cherish this earpiece... I won't lose it, even if I lose myself!

t_ch: 请都别弄丢，谢谢合作。
t_en: Please don't lose anything. Thank you for your cooperation.

t_ch: 不好了！观景车厢绿植里面出现了很多恐怖的蛞蝓…怎么会这样帕！
t_en: Bad news! We discovered many horrifying slugs in the Parlor Car's plants... What do we do!

t_ch: 看种类，这应该是「锡毗露蛞蝓」。恐怕是从上次采购的那批腐殖土里面孵化的吧。
t_en: Looking at its species, should be the Tinplate Slug. I fear they must have hatched from the humus we purchased previously.

t_ch: 真是失算帕，当时就该听你的，不要贪小便宜……
t_en: A huge miscalculation. If only I hadn't skimped on quality and listened to you back then...

t_ch: 唉，还是先处理眼前的问题吧…这些蛞蝓会吃绿植的根茎，黏液还有腐蚀性，最重要的是…它们的样子…又黏又滑、嘴里还有一圈尖牙，实在有点恐怖帕！
t_en: *sigh* Let's just get back to the problem at hand... These slugs will eat the plants' roots, and their secretions are corrosive. Most importantly... they look... slimy and sticky, and they've got a rim of sharp fangs! Eww!
